msg: v0.1.13: fix initrd busybox, auto-inject initrd, guest agent support
v0.1.12: ship minimal initrd with virtio modules
v0.1.11: use host kernel+initrd fallback, document known issues
Document known issues: virtio-mmio discovery and serial buffering
v0.1.10: fix kernel build — verify and force virtio configs after olddefconfig
v0.1.9: fix kernel — force virtio_net/balloon/console in overlay
v0.1.8: fix virtio discovery for net/serial/balloon
Fix virtio device discovery: enable ACPI + auto-kernel-cmdline + mmio cmdline devices
Roadmap: add gaps from testing and smolvm comparison
v0.1.7: fix cloud-init — add iso9660/vfat to kernel, agent to template
v0.1.6: cloud-init, qemu-agent, Docker first-boot setup
Roadmap: add SSH agent forwarding, network isolation, egress allow-list, declarative config
Roadmap: add AArch64/ARM64 support as low-priority exploratory item
Roadmap: add Plan 9 / 9Front microVM support as low-priority nice-to-have
Roadmap: check off cloud-init
Cloud-init + qemu-agent + Docker first-boot setup
Add comprehensive roadmap with priorities, impact, and effort
Fix CI: update oras to 1.3.2 (1.2.2 tarball broken)
v0.1.5: docs restructure, GUI, init, balloon
Restructure docs: concise README with demo GIF, split into docs/
GUI extension, proper init, balloon device
Use qboot for instant kernel loading, disable balloon in config
Fix: allow vga=serial0 (PVE serial console redirect)
v0.1.4: serial console in PVE UI, trixie-slim default, end-to-end tested
Default to debian:trixie-slim, support systemd images
Add pve-microvm-template: OCI image to PVE template workflow
Fix runtime issues from live testing
Fix network: correct bridge script path (/usr/libexec/qemu-server/)
Fix runtime: proper Perl module imports, args quoting, get_vm_machine
v0.1.3: publish .deb to GitHub Packages via ORAS
